path_disposition_authority.authority_boundary: Path closure is historical migration evidence and never establishes capability parity.

capabilities.current_state: Prime is the sole canonical source and Codex is frozen predecessor evidence.
capabilities.required_proof: Repository policy, source hierarchy, and clean-clone readback.

capabilities.current_state: Prime has deterministic startup source but lacks continuity, closeout, and reachability checks.
capabilities.required_proof: Fresh-context restart journey with durable next-gate reconstruction.

capabilities.current_state: Prime exposes a compact route table but not the complete interaction contract.
capabilities.required_proof: Route-line, Preview to Execute, method-reporting, and decision-gate acceptance tests.

capabilities.current_state: No Prime-native continuity-backed Emberline projection exists.
capabilities.required_proof: Deterministic non-authoritative projection from Quest and continuity source.

capabilities.current_state: Quest Board is canonical but does not carry operational unfinished-work detail.
capabilities.required_proof: Prime continuity schema, canonical register, and restart readback.

capabilities.current_state: Prime has no one-entry continuity update route.
capabilities.required_proof: Exactly one entry changes through a bounded draft-PR transaction.

capabilities.current_state: Quest Board remains the sole canonical Quest registry.
capabilities.required_proof: Quest Board schema and source readback.

capabilities.capability: Routine Quest admission/update without validator code edits
capabilities.current_state: Prime validation hard-codes the current four Quest source paths.
capabilities.required_proof: Schema-driven valid admission with unchanged validator code.

capabilities.current_state: No Prime hosted intake or launcher exists.
capabilities.required_proof: Owner-authorized hosted intake invokes the singular Thread Engine and creates a harmless draft PR.

capabilities.current_state: Prime has no issue form or equivalent guided publisher.
capabilities.required_proof: Guided intake, canonical mission digest, rejection cases, and exact readback.

capabilities.current_state: Prime exact mission packages and the singular engine exist, but the guarded hosted source-pack user journey is not proven.
capabilities.required_proof: Hosted exact mission carrier compiles to one immutable draft-PR transaction with exact readback.

capabilities.current_state: Overlapping patch engines are retired in favor of one exact Prime mission schema and singular engine.
capabilities.required_proof: No second normal repository writer and named exact-mission equivalent.

capabilities.current_state: Prime Thread Engine is active, mission-scoped, immutable-branch, and draft-PR-only.
capabilities.required_proof: Activation state, harmless pilot, replay rejection, and readback receipts.

capabilities.current_state: Direct Spear and immutable Arrow/Bow component parity is proven and merged.
capabilities.required_proof: Merged parity proof and compiler tests.

capabilities.capability: Athena can reach Thread Engine from a fresh chat
capabilities.current_state: Component delivery is proven but fresh Work/Athena reachability is not.
capabilities.required_proof: Actual Work submission, truthful identity receipt, hosted run, draft PR, and exact CI.

capabilities.current_state: The reusable audit framework and contract fixtures are present.
capabilities.required_proof: Static contract and deterministic receipt tests.

capabilities.current_state: Prime now contains the GitHub-native Oathbringer BUILD, REPAIR, and EXECUTE adapter in PILOT_READY_PROOF_PENDING state, but no harmless live production journey has yet been accepted.
capabilities.required_proof: AJ-04 BUILD, AJ-05 REPAIR, and AJ-06 EXECUTE must pass through the thin PowerShell client with exact receipts, GitHub readback, applicable CI, and independent reconciliation.

capabilities.current_state: Prime owns a deterministic bounded generator whose outputs do not govern.
capabilities.required_proof: Repeated byte-identical generation and generated-boundary tests.

capabilities.current_state: Whole-program CI runs on both platforms, but dedicated generated byte-parity evidence is absent.
capabilities.required_proof: Linux and Windows artifact hash registers match exactly.

capabilities.current_state: No hosted exact-base generated-only draft-PR publisher exists.
capabilities.required_proof: Immutable branch, exact-base recheck, generated-only diff, draft PR, and readback.

capabilities.current_state: One read-only workflow validates Prime on Ubuntu and Windows.
capabilities.required_proof: Exact-head validate checks succeed on both platforms.

capabilities.capability: Sunset closeout and restart-safe archive handoff
capabilities.current_state: Prime has lifecycle doctrine but no active restart-safe Sunset route.
capabilities.required_proof: Sunset writes bounded continuity and a fresh context reconstructs the next safe gate.

capabilities.capability: Sunrise / Argus surfacing of unfinished work
capabilities.current_state: No Prime operational continuity source feeds Sunrise or Argus.
capabilities.required_proof: Durable continuity projection and next-action selection without chat memory.

capabilities.current_state: Prime recovery is clone-first, hash-bound, and independent of normal Codex use.
capabilities.required_proof: Clean clone, complete validation, deterministic regeneration, and rollback classification.

capabilities.current_state: Prime keeps secrets and protected raw evidence outside clean source.
capabilities.required_proof: Privacy scanning and protected-boundary tests.

capabilities.current_state: The 525-path ledger remains complete historical evidence but does not govern this register.
capabilities.required_proof: Path ledger remains byte-preserved while capability outcomes are tracked separately.

capabilities.current_state: Component tests exist but the required user journeys are not all proven.
capabilities.required_proof: All acceptance IDs in the canonical contract have exact receipts or explicit blocked evidence.

capabilities.current_state: Prime retains immutable branches, exact missions, truthful identity, and one normal engine.
capabilities.required_proof: No force update, mutable PR reuse, second repository writer, or identity impersonation.
